# ceph_osd (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `osd_id` (Number) Numeric Ceph OSD ID (e.g. 0, 1, 2).

### Optional

- `in` (Boolean) Whether the OSD is 'in' the cluster (true) or 'out' (false).
- `weight` (Number) CRUSH weight of the OSD.

### Read-Only

- `crush_location` (Map of String)
- `device_class` (String) Device class of the OSD (hdd, ssd, nvme).
- `host` (String) Host name where the OSD is running (if available).
- `id` (String) Terraform resource ID (stringified OSD ID).
- `up` (Boolean) Whether the OSD is currently 'up' (true) or 'down' (false).
